Stake $WAI

1. Add to Home Screen if you have not yet done so

2. Once added, login using any of the options provided

3. A new account will be created and saved for you thereafter

Add to Home Screen

For the best experience, please install the app following the steps.

1. In your Chrome browser menu, tap the Ellipsis icon (looks like three vertical dots)

2. Choose ' Install App' in the options

3. Open the AI Waifu app on your home screen

4. Login

Subscribe to notifications

Coinbase Wallet app

Connect with your self-custody wallet

  1. Open Coinbase Wallet app
  2. Tap Scan

Or try the Coinbase Wallet browser extension

  • Connect with dapps with just one click on your desktop browser
  • Add an additional layer of security by using a supported Ledger hardware wallet
